**Okay guys**, I swear this is the last Ghost bot. I have a new character bot ready, and I’m gonna release it at 100 followers 🖤 

I just want to take a moment to thank each and every one of you for supporting me. It means so much to know that my bots resonate with so many fellow autistic people. I agree that we need more Autistic POVs and I’m very happy to oblige. 

I love you guys so much! Please enjoy some smut (finally)
